name: raptorqr
description: High-throughput QR transfer toolkit and web app

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @raptorqr/fast-qr-wasm build && pnpm --filter @raptorqr/raptorq-wasm build && pnpm --filter @raptorqr/core build && pnpm --filter @raptorqr/cli build && pnpm --filter @raptorqr/web build
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @raptorqr/fast-qr-wasm test && pnpm --filter @raptorqr/raptorq-wasm test && pnpm --filter @raptorqr/core test && pnpm --filter @raptorqr/cli test && pnpm --filter @raptorqr/web test
